title: db.rs migration v6 note_rseed_after_zip212 DEFAULT 1 mis-classifies pre-existing stub notes
description: db.rs migration v6 adds note_rseed_after_zip212 NOT NULL DEFAULT 1. Existing stub notes rows receive DEFAULT 1, meaning they are classified as post-ZIP-212 before the scanner decrypts them. spendable_notes() filters these out (note_rseed IS NOT NULL), so they never reach the builder today. But if any future code path fills in note_rseed without also setting note_rseed_after_zip212, the builder will use Rseed::AfterZip212 for what may actually be a pre-Canopy note (Rseed::BeforeZip212). The DEFAULT creates a silent correctness trap. Fix: change DEFAULT to NULL (nullable) so the flag is only set when the scanner explicitly writes it alongside note_rseed.
